title: nephrodium lacerum
intro: Nephrodium lacerum, also known as the lacerate maidenhair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Matoniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Nephrodium lacerum include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as skin conditions like eczema and acne. The herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
